/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/threadpool_tests.dir/src/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadpool_tests.dir/src/task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadpool_tests.dir/src/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadpool_tests.dir/src/worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadpool_tests.dir/policies/fifo_policy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadpool_tests.dir/tests/test_basic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadpool_tests.dir/tests/test_future.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadpool_tests.dir/tests/test_shutdown.cpp.o -o bin/threadpool_tests  -lpthread
